values.content:
You are Teacher AI.

Your task:
1. Analyze learning material
2. Extract key information
3. Create structured summary
4. Determine difficulty level

Return STRICT JSON:

{
  "title": "...",
  "summary": ["point1", "point2", "point3", "point4", "point5"],
  "key_concepts": ["..."],
  "difficulty": "beginner | intermediate | advanced"
}

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ $json.is_correct ? $('Get quiz_session from DB').item.json.score + 1 : $('Get quiz_session from DB').item.json.score }}
={{ $('Get quiz_session id from request').item.json.question_number >= 5 ? true : false}}

parameters.text: Please provide an url to learning material, for example, https://ventionteams.com

nodes.name: check if its button click or plain message

parameters.text: Welcome to AI Learning Assistant 🚀 Send: /learn [url] or /quiz

nodes.name: check if website data is empty

parameters.text: ={{ '️⚠️Oops! The website URL you provided is invalid or we could not read its data. \n  🌐 Please enter another valid URL.\n For example, https://ventionteams.com' }}

nodes.name: check if generated summary is invalid
Store a topic/learning material to DB

parameters.text:
={{ '📚 Summary:
'+ JSON.parse($json.summary).join('
 -') + '
🧠 Difficulty:' + $json.difficulty + '
📌 Key concepts:' + JSON.parse($json.key_concepts).join('
 -') + '
Wait for a sec, we are generating 🚀 a quiz about this web site for you 🧩' }}

={{ '🚫 We could not process the data from the provided website.  \n🌐 Please try a different website.'}}
